## Description

A clear description of the feature you'd like.

## Use Case

Why do you need this? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution

How you think it could work (API example, behavior description, etc.).

```php
// Example API usage if applicable
LocalNotifications::schedule([
    'id' => 'example',
    // ...
]);
```

## Platform

- [ ] Android
- [ ] iOS
- [ ] Both

## Additional Context

Any other context, mockups, or references to similar features in other libraries.
